• Procedural underground world with mining, AOE, and explosives.
  • Full UI: touch controls, dashboard, shop, chat, server list, and admin panel.
  • Audio engine, custom texture loader, host‑election, cloud sync, and save system.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy(item)

This HTML/JS game builds a 2‑D mining world using seeded terrain, lets players move, drill, and build items (including TNT/Nuke). It includes a responsive UI with touch controls, inventory, shop upgrades, chat, and admin features while handling multiplayer sync, host election, and cloud saves. The code also provides a sound manager, custom texture system, and configurable graphics settings.
